title: FashionPurchaseExtraction
description: Result of POST /extract — structured fashion purchases extracted from one receipt email snippet. The iOS app and the backend both validate against this; their language-native models must stay in sync.

is_fashion.description: True iff the email represents a purchase of clothing, footwear, bags, or jewelry/accessories. If false, items must be empty.

source_msg_id.description: Gmail message id supplied by the caller, echoed verbatim.

items.description: Fashion items in the order. Empty iff is_fashion is false.

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the extracted record.

image_url.description: Product image URL if extractable from the receipt.
